aliasResolution.resolution: ticket_local_linked_refs_as_authority is forbidden; downstream UI must read SupportLineageBinding and SupportLineageScopeMember
history starts as summary_only and widens only with SupportContextDisclosureRecord
support summaries may stage locally but durable timeline, replay, handoff, or export truth requires provenance binding
compact masked identity, contact health, open object, outcome, and repeat-contact summary only
lineage or runtime drift preserves the current ticket shell and anchor with a reacquire action

parallelGaps.missingSurface: Controlled resend, delivery repair, action workbench, and replay settlement objects are not owned by task 218.
parallelGaps.temporaryFallback: Publish support action refs, lineage binding, actionable scope member, artifact provenance refs, and read-only fallback seam without arming outbound side effects.
parallelGaps.riskIfUnresolved: Support UI could try to send or replay from ticket-local state instead of the governing communication chain.
parallelGaps.followUpAction: Task 219 must bind SupportMutationAttempt, SupportActionRecord, SupportActionSettlement, SupportReplayCheckpoint, SupportReplayEvidenceBoundary, and SupportReplayRestoreSettlement to this lineage contract.

parallelGaps.missingSurface: Support frontend route implementation for ticket shell, omnichannel timeline, contextual panels, and read-only fallback is downstream.
